base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of lucavi_demons — a character (final_boss) from 1997 final fantasy tactics. 12 Zodiac Lucavi demons — Virgo/Aries/Taurus/Gemini/Cancer/Leo etc. + Altima/Ultima (final-boss angel). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 12 Zodiac Lucavi demons — Virgo/Aries/Taurus/Gemini/Cancer/Leo etc. + Altima/Ultima (final-boss angel)
